antithesis_summary: Spend the saved value-embedding budget on more ordinary depth, even if that costs throughput.
label: Capacity vs throughput
thesis_summary: Preserve the plain 8-layer scale first so the branch measures maximal short-run step count with the current simple stack.
why_active: If the plain stack lands only slightly behind the archived winner, the next question is whether the missing quality came from lost capacity or from losing the specific value-embedding mechanism. That makes a deeper plain follow-up the most natural counterpoint.
